name: Bard: Cutting Words Control — Reactive BI die subtraction + Vicious Mockery disadvantage
description: A level 5 College of Lore Bard solos a Hobgoblin Captain and a Gnoll. Tests the College of Lore L3 subclass feature 'Cutting Words' — as a reaction when a creature within 60ft makes an attack roll, ability check, or damage roll, expend one Bardic Inspiration use to subtract the rolled die from that roll. Per RAW: Hobgoblin rolls 15 to hit -> Bard reacts -> subtract d8 (queued 6) -> 15-6=9 vs AC 15 -> miss. Second enemy attack has Cutting Words unavailable (only 1 reaction/round) -> hits. Then Vicious Mockery imposes disadvantage on Hobgoblin's next attack. EXPECTED FAILURE: Cutting Words is Phase 3.9 (not yet implemented), so the reaction prompt will not fire; this scenario is the deliverable that drives implementation.

character.comment: Solo Bard L5 College of Lore. CHA 18 (+4), proficiency +3. bardicInspiration pool = 4 uses of d8. Spell save DC 15.
character.name: Lyra

features.name: Bardic Inspiration
features.description: Bonus action, grant d8 to ally

features.name: Cutting Words
features.description: College of Lore L3 — reaction: spend BI to subtract d8 from an enemy attack/check/damage roll within 60ft

monsters.comment: Hobgoblin Captain — melee +5 attack. Positioned adjacent for melee.
monsters.name: Hobgoblin Captain

actions.comment: Queue dice: [Hob init=15 (→17), Gnoll init=10 (→11), Hob attack d20=15 (→20), CW d8=6 (20-6=14<15 miss), Gnoll attack d20=5 (→9<15 miss)].
Lyra rolls 5 for initiative so monsters act first, triggering reaction opportunity.
Wait for Hobgoblin attack. Server should prompt a Cutting Words reaction because this is Lore Bard subclass. Expected failure: Phase 3.9 not implemented -> prompt never fires.
Use Cutting Words: subtract 1d8 from Hobgoblin's attack roll. Consumes 1 BI use + reaction.
ASSERT: Hobgoblin missed (15 - 6 = 9 vs AC 15) AND BI pool 4 -> 3 AND Lyra took no damage from Hobgoblin.

Wait for Lyra's turn — Gnoll's attack should have RESOLVED NORMALLY (hits on 10+4=14 vs AC 15 -> miss, actually) because reaction already consumed. Actually 14 < 15 so Gnoll also misses by rolls; assertion adjusted in later step.
R1 ACTION: Vicious Mockery on Hobgoblin Captain — DC 15 WIS save (Hob WIS 10 +0 = needs 15+). On fail: 1d4 psychic + disadvantage on next attack roll before end of its next turn.

input.text: cast Vicious Mockery at Hobgoblin Captain

actions.comment: ASSERT: Vicious Mockery applied 'disadvantage on next attack' debuff to Hobgoblin. RAW 2024 spell effect.
R2: queue Hobgoblin attack at 18 total (would hit) — but disadvantage should force lower of two rolls. Queue [18, 4, 6] — with disadvantage take 4 -> 4+5=9 miss.
ASSERT: Hobgoblin attack rolled with disadvantage -> took 4, miss. Lyra should be near full HP (small scratch from a prior attack acceptable).
